description_long: This apartment building features a boxy, modernist design with clean, angular lines and a flat roof. The facade is predominantly white with large, vertically oriented windows that provide ample natural light to the interior. The front side includes a recessed entryway and a combination of narrow and wide window panels, creating a visually dynamic appearance. The rear of the building displays a large glass section, likely for communal or living spaces, and a subtle overhang above the ground floor. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete and glass, with some dark accent panels adding contrast. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with a focus on geometric forms and functional design.
description: A modern, boxy apartment building with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist white facade accented by dark panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing a recessed entryway, vertical window panels, and a clean, angular facade.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the overhanging upper floor and a mix of window sizes, with some dark accent panels visible.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large glass section spanning much of the facade, likely for communal or living areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal window openings and a prominent dark panel section at the base.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a vertical orientation with some asymmetry, featuring a mix of narrow and wide panels spaced irregularly across the facade.
